text_raw: Perhaps... this will free me from my wretched bondage.
text_clean: Perhaps... this will free me from my wretched bondage.

text_raw: Can no one break these chains...?
text_clean: Can no one break these chains...?

text_raw: By His order, all who draw near must die.
text_clean: By His order, all who draw near must die.

text_raw: Your courage is noted. It does not grant passage.
text_clean: Your courage is noted. It does not grant passage.

text_raw: I know not what I guard. I only obey.
text_clean: I know not what I guard. I only obey.

text_raw: For drawing too close, you must die.
text_clean: For drawing too close, you must die.

text_raw: If you wish to live, flee. I was not ordered to pursue.
text_clean: If you wish to live, flee. I was not ordered to pursue.
